channel.title: Animation on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Animation on RaihnForge

item.title: Back2Warcraft Twitch Emote — B2WRip
item.description:
B2WRip is a Twitch emote made for the Back2Warcraft channel, the long-running shoutcasting home for Warcraft III esports. The mark is built to be readable at Twitch’s tiny emote sizes (28px, 56px, 112px) while still carrying the channel’s visual personality, so it lands in chat the moment a play goes south.

Designed as part of an ongoing graphics package for B2W, alongside a paired animated shoutout sequence that triggers on stream when the emote gets spammed during a moment of dramatic loss. The animation extends the emote into a short on-broadcast beat that closes the loop between chat and the show itself.

item.title: WIP — Mecromage Animation Demo
item.description:
Mecromage has been in development for longer than I care to admit. It started as a concept in 2013 and has gone through more iterations than I can count — which is both a testament to stubbornness and a record of how much my craft has grown.

The animation demo collects a set of sprite-based assets built in Adobe Animate CC: walk cycles, idle states, and combat motions. These aren’t the final designs, but they represent a significant milestone in moving from concept to something that actually moves.
